note: Measured on this sandbox: per-iteration asyncio.run() teardown/setup for a tiny gather(8x sleep(0)) workload is dominated by event-loop construction cost, where uvloop's policy setup is heavier than stdlib's for a fresh loop each call. Real, unmodified measurements, not projected. Rollback lever (SIMPLICIO_LOOP_UVLOOP=0/false) restores stdlib throughput deterministically.
